transcription.text: there the breakfast dishes are done now children I have been stuck in this kitchen all morning and I won't easy now mother remember the soup it's no trouble at all disappoint you I'll give you each a nice hot bowl of Campbell's vegetable soup and a sandwich go wash your hands and this soup is delicious makes a good lunch all those good vegetables I like the alphabet I like the wet part that's the broth Campbell makes it would be stock Billy Susie there you are forever having lunch with the neighbors Jane I hope it isn't too much trouble well to tell the truth Martha remember the soup it's no trouble at all only takes four minutes to heat up some Campbell's they always eat better when you remember the soup reach for the Campbell's it's right on your
